scripts.check: node --check boa-daemon.js && node --check src/boa.js && node --check src/boa-gate.js && node --check src/aletheia_bridge.js && node --check src/boa_site.js && node --check bin/boa-node.js && node --check scripts/aws-apprunner-preflight.js && node --check scripts/aws-apprunner-deploy.js && node --check scripts/prepare-production.js && node --check public/assets/app.js && node --check test/boa.test.js
scripts.build: npm run check && npm test && npm run prepare:production
scripts.aws:elasticbeanstalk: npm run build && zip -r boa-aws-bundle.zip package.json README.md DEPLOY_AWS.md BOA_ARCHITECTURE.md AWS_DEPLOYMENT_DECISION.md PRODUCTION_AUDIT.md Procfile Dockerfile apprunner.yaml buildspec.yml boa-daemon.js bin scripts src public integrations test dist
